GpuProjectExec: expr=[sum(catalog_sales.cs_ext_discount_amt)@0 as excess discount amount]
  GpuGlobalLimitExec: skip=0, fetch=100
    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(catalog_sales.cs_ext_discount_amt)]
      GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[sum(catalog_sales.cs_ext_discount_amt)]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=38347922
            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@1, cs_item_sk@1)], filter=CAST(cs_ext_discount_amt@0 AS Decimal128(30, 15)) > Float64(1.3) * avg(catalog_sales.cs_ext_discount_amt)@1, projection=[0]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=38347922
                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=38347922
                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(cs_sold_date_sk@0, d_date_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2]
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=38347922
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cs_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=38347922
                              GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, cs_item_sk@1)], projection=[0, 1, 3]
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=38347922
                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=38347922
                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=38347922
                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cs_item_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=38347922
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=38347922

                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=38347922

                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=38347922

--- memory ---
